title: Supply Chain Manager - Rail Vikas Nigam - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rail Vikas Nigam - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Supply Chain Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
